verses.44: Then Moses came with Joshua son of Nun and recited all the words of this song in the hearing of the people.
verses.45: When Moses had finished reciting all these words to all Israel,
verses.46: he said to them, “Take to heart all the words I have solemnly declared to you this day, so that you may command your children to carefully follow all the words of this law.
verses.47: For they are not idle words to you, because they are your life, and by them you will live long in the land that you are crossing the Jordan to possess.”
verses.48: On that same day the LORD said to Moses,
verses.49: “Go up into the Abarim Range to Mount Nebo, in the land of Moab across from Jericho, and view the land of Canaan, which I am giving to the Israelites as their own possession.
verses.50: And there on the mountain that you climb, you will die and be gathered to your people, just as your brother Aaron died on Mount Hor and was gathered to his people.
verses.51: For at the waters of Meribah-kadesh in the Wilderness of Zin, both of you broke faith with Me among the Israelites by failing to treat Me as holy in their presence.
verses.52: Although you shall see from a distance the land that I am giving the Israelites, you shall not enter it.”
